description: Redact PII span attributes from checkout-service traces before storage. Replaces user.email and payment.card_number with <PII> markers using the redact processor.

redact.description: Redact email address from checkout span attributes

Redact card number from checkout span attributes. Pattern anchors on BIN prefix per network: Visa (4xxx, 13/16-digit), Mastercard (51-55xx, 16-digit), Amex (34/37xx, 15-digit), Discover (6011/65xx, 16-digit), JCB (2131/1800/35xxx, 15-digit).
